source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析7》

segments.text: Good morning, everyone!
segments.translation: 大家早上好！

segments.text: My name's Janet Parker, and I'm the Human Resources Manager of this company.
segments.translation: 我叫珍妮特·帕克，是这家公司的人力资源经理。

segments.text: Thank you for joining us and coming to this training session, which I hope will help you quickly learn about our company and know what you will do in your position.
segments.translation: 感谢大家加入我们并参加这次培训，我希望它能帮助你们迅速了解公司，清楚自己在岗位上要做什么。

segments.text: First, I'll briefly introduce the history of our company.
segments.translation: 首先，我来简要介绍一下公司的历史。

segments.text: We're quite an old company, specializing in electronic toys for more than thirty years.
segments.translation: 我们是一家历史相当悠久的公司，专门生产电子玩具已有三十多年。

segments.text: The founder, Ronald Stevenson, got the idea of establishing his own company when he finished his apprenticeship.
segments.translation: 创始人罗纳德·史蒂文森在完成学徒期时，萌生了创办自己公司的想法。

segments.text: With the support of his grandfather, he got enough start-up capital and the company was set up and succeeded in a short period.
segments.translation: 在祖父的支持下，他获得了足够的启动资金，公司得以成立并在短时间内取得成功。

segments.text: To satisfy the demands of customers, we've expanded the premises considerably over the past years, and the number of staff members has grown up on a regular basis.
segments.translation: 为满足客户需求，过去几年我们大幅扩建了经营场所，员工人数也一直稳步增长。

segments.text: Recently we found the sales of our products creeping up very slowly, and we decided to introduce new electronic toys to give that a boost, so we have to look for more workers to help us, and that's the reason why you are here.
segments.translation: 最近我们发现产品销量增长得非常缓慢，于是决定推出新的电子玩具来促进销售，因此必须招募更多员工来协助我们，这就是你们来到这里的原因。

segments.text: The first week may be pretty challenging as there will be a lot of new information.
segments.translation: 第一周可能会很有挑战性，因为会有大量新信息。

segments.text: But don't worry too much about trying to remember everything.
segments.translation: 不过，不必过于担心要把一切都记住。

segments.text: The important thing is to check with someone if you're unsure what to do.
segments.translation: 重要的是，如果不确定该怎么做，就向别人确认。

segments.text: According to the contract, you'll be expected to work here for six months.
segments.translation: 根据合同，你们需要在这里工作六个月。

segments.text: Some of you asked me if there is a possibility for you to be employed as our full-time member.
segments.translation: 你们中有人问过我，是否有机会成为我们的全职员工。

segments.text: I can't give you a definite answer now.
segments.translation: 我现在无法给出明确答复。

segments.text: It'll depend on your job performance during the employment and whether we have job vacancies then.
segments.translation: 这将取决于你们受雇期间的工作表现，以及届时我们是否有职位空缺。

segments.text: About two hundred full-time staff members in our company, seventy percent of whom are responsible for sending out goods, while the minority of jobs are in the manufacturing line.
segments.translation: 我们公司大约有两百名全职员工，其中百分之七十负责发货，只有少数岗位在生产线上。

segments.text: You will work in different departments according to our needs, which I'll explain to you in detail later.
segments.translation: 你们将根据我们的需要在不同部门工作，稍后我会详细说明。

segments.text: Working in our company, you'll be impressed by our modern machinery and production methods, advanced skills and friendly working atmosphere.
segments.translation: 在我们公司工作，现代化的机械和生产方式、先进的技术以及友好的工作氛围都会给你们留下深刻印象。

segments.text: However, I must tell you one thing which is not so pleasant.
segments.translation: 不过，我必须告诉你们一件不太愉快的事。

segments.text: Because the manager of the payroll department is on sick leave these days, I'm afraid that you won't get paid on time this month.
segments.translation: 由于薪资部门经理这几天请病假，恐怕你们这个月无法按时领到工资。

segments.text: But don't worry too much; it'll be solved very soon.
segments.translation: 但不必太担心，这个问题很快就会解决。

segments.text: In the second part of this training session, I'll explain what you will be responsible for in the following working days.
segments.translation: 在本次培训的第二部分，我会说明接下来几个工作日里你们各自负责的工作。

segments.text: There are five positions and you'll be working in different departments.
segments.translation: 共有五个岗位，你们将在不同部门工作。

segments.text: As I've mentioned before, we're in urgent need of someone who can deal with the salary problem, so our staff can get paid as soon as possible, and that's the primary job for the first person.
segments.translation: 正如我之前提到的，我们急需有人处理薪资问题，让员工尽快拿到工资，这就是第一位员工的首要任务。

segments.text: Then the second of you will be working in the manufacturing line to help develop new products, and I'm sure you will be pretty busy in the following days.
segments.translation: 第二位将在生产线上工作，协助开发新产品，我相信接下来几天你会非常忙。

segments.text: The third person will work on the sixth floor, and your main job is to look after the mechanical side.
segments.translation: 第三位将在六楼工作，主要职责是负责机械方面的事务。

segments.text: It includes checking equipment daily to ensure they are working correctly and doing some repair work if necessary.
segments.translation: 这包括每天检查设备以确保其正常运转，并在必要时进行维修。

segments.text: Without your help, many processes like manufacturing or packaging won't work well.
segments.translation: 没有你的帮助，生产或包装等许多流程都无法顺利运行。

segments.text: Then, the fourth person will work in the technology department to deal with problems related to software and hardware.
segments.translation: 第四位将在技术部门工作，处理与软件和硬件有关的问题。

segments.text: We're getting new laptops next week, and you must install new programs.
segments.translation: 我们下周会购置新笔记本电脑，你必须安装新程序。

segments.text: And the last of you will work in the after-sale service department.
segments.translation: 最后一位将在售后服务部门工作。

segments.text: You are expected to keep a long-term relationship with customers, including collecting feedback regularly, dealing with customer complaints, enhancing customer satisfaction etc.
segments.translation: 你需要与客户维持长期关系，包括定期收集反馈、处理客户投诉、提高客户满意度等。

segments.text: OK, now that's all I want to share with you today.
segments.translation: 好了，这就是我今天想和大家分享的全部内容。

segments.text: Are there any questions ...
segments.translation: 有什么问题吗……
